name: Jean Loui Bernard
fullName: Jean Loui Bernard Silva de Jesus
title: Software Engineer
tagline: I build reliable software end to end — from the APIs and microservices underneath to the interfaces people actually use.
summary: I'm a full-stack Software Engineer and Computer Science graduate from the Federal University of Bahia, with a strong foundation in systems design, APIs and software architecture.

I design and ship software that people actually use — from open-source libraries with hundreds of thousands of downloads to web applications backed by microservices, data pipelines and search infrastructure.

I care deeply about algorithms, data structures and performance — sharpened through competitive programming contests like the ICPC — and I enjoy building software that scales and solves real problems.
